title: Design an API Gateway
input_format: Incoming HTTP requests with various paths, headers, and payloads
output_format: Routed requests to downstream services or error responses (4xx, 5xx)
example_input:
GET /api/v1/orders HTTP/1.1
Host: api.shop.com
Authorization: Bearer <token>
constraints: Must handle 1M+ requests per second. Latency overhead < 5ms. Support dynamic routing and circuit breaking. Handle SSL termination and logging.
function_signature: class ApiGateway { route(request: HttpRequest): Promise<HttpResponse>; addService(config: ServiceConfig): void; applyMiddleware(middleware: Middleware): void; }
